settings.heading: Restoration
settings.subtext: Bringing an old or unfinished project back to life - mechanical restoration done with care and patience so your car drives the way it was meant to.

settings.title: Care & Patience
settings.text: Restoration isn't a rush job. We take the time to get the details right.

settings.title: Mechanical Focus
settings.text: Engines, driveline and running gear brought back to proper working order.

settings.title: Project Cars Welcome
settings.text: Started something and run out of time or know-how? We'll help you finish it.

settings.heading: Projects Brought Back To Life
settings.body1: Bringing an old or unfinished project back to life. Mechanical restoration done with care and patience so your car looks, drives and feels the way it was meant to.
settings.body2: Whether it's a full mechanical restoration or picking up a stalled project, we take the time to do it properly.
settings.points: Full & partial restorations | Mechanical rebuilds | Careful, patient workmanship | Project cars welcome
settings.seo_description: Mechanical car restoration in Sunshine West. Full and partial restorations and rebuilds done with care and patience. Project cars welcome at Niche Automotive.
settings.strip_sub: Tell us about the car and where it's at, and we'll talk through the next steps.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
